key.name: file-preview-visibility
key.summary: File preview shows a preview of the contents of a file. File info shows some information about the file.

key.name: file-preview-exclusion-patterns
key.summary: Files matching these glob patterns will not have a preview

key.name: background-size
key.summary: Background size of the image preview

key.name: syntax-highlighting
key.summary: Enable syntax highlighting in the text preview

key.name: show-line-numbers
key.summary: Show line numbers in the text preview
